---
title: "Construction and basic editing of the phylogenetic trees assessing _Epichloë_ specimens"
author: "Sotomayor-Alge, Alba"
date: "05-26-2025"
output:
  bookdown::pdf_book:
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: yes
    highlight: tango
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
---

\newpage

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
```

# Working session setup

```{r Load packages into working session}

# Function to silently load packages without warnings or messages
load_packages <- function(pkgs) {
  invisible(
    lapply(pkgs, function(pkg) {
      suppressWarnings(
        suppressMessages(
          if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE, quietly = TRUE)) {
            stop(paste("❌ Package not found:", pkg), call. = FALSE)
          }
        )
      )
    })
  )
}

# Vector of required packages
packages_needed <- c("tidyverse")

# Call the function to load them
load_packages(packages_needed)

```

```{r Working session information}

# Print the information of the working session in order to ensure reproducibility
sessionInfo()

```

```{r Create directories}

# Create directories within the file system to save the results of the analyses
dir.create("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script3", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

```


# Obtaining the heatmap for alkaloids PCR data

```{r Load alkaloids PCR dataset and transform it}

# Load the dataset
alkaloid_pcr <- read.table("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/ALKALOIDS/alkaloids_PCR.csv",
                            sep = ";", header = TRUE)

# Declare Metadata columns to extract them before transformation
meta_cols_pcr <- c("Hostsp", "IndividualID", "SampleID", "E")

# Save the original order of the dataset
sample_order_pcr <- alkaloid_pcr$SampleID
gene_order_pcr <- colnames(alkaloid_pcr)[!(colnames(alkaloid_pcr) %in%
                  c("Hostsp","IndividualID","SampleID","E"))]

# Transform dataset to long format
alkaloid_pcr_lng <- alkaloid_pcr %>%
  pivot_longer(-all_of(meta_cols_pcr),
               names_to = "Gene",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Value = factor(Value, levels = c("-", "+")))

# Establish original order
alkaloid_pcr_lng$SampleID <- factor(alkaloid_pcr_lng$SampleID, 
                                    levels = sample_order_pcr)
alkaloid_pcr_lng$Gene<- factor(alkaloid_pcr_lng$Gene, 
                                    levels = rev(gene_order_pcr))

```

```{r Plot heatmap with alkaloid PCR data}

# Set output directory
out_dir_heat <- "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script3"

# Draw the heatmap
heatmap_pcr <- ggplot(alkaloid_pcr_lng, aes(x = SampleID, y = Gene)) +
  geom_tile(fill = "white", color = "grey", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Value, color = Value), size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("+" = "#2E8B57", "-" = "#8B0000")) +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.50) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 5, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 4),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4),
    plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2)  # less inner margins
  )

# Save the heatmap into a PDF file (A4 landscape -> more width => wider rectangles)
ggsave(filename = file.path(out_dir_heat, "heatmap_alkaloids_PCR.pdf"), 
       plot = heatmap_pcr, width = 11.14, height = 8.27, units = "in")

```

\newpage

# Obtaining the heatmap for alkaloids qualitative data

```{r Load alkaloids qualitative dataset and transform it}

# Load the dataset
alkaloid_data <- read.table("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/ALKALOIDS/alkaloids_qualitative.csv",
                            sep = ";", header = TRUE)

# Declare Metadata columns to extract them before transformation
meta_cols <- c("Hostsp", "IndividualID", "SampleID", "E")

# Save the original order of the dataset
sample_order <- alkaloid_data$SampleID
compound_order <- colnames(alkaloid_data)[!(colnames(alkaloid_data) %in%
                  c("Hostsp","IndividualID","SampleID","E"))]

# Transform dataset to long format
alkaloid_lng <- alkaloid_data %>%
  pivot_longer(-all_of(meta_cols),
               names_to = "Compound",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Value = factor(Value, levels = c("NO", "TRACES", "YES")))

# Establish original order
alkaloid_lng$SampleID <- factor(alkaloid_lng$SampleID, levels = sample_order)
alkaloid_lng$Compound <- factor(alkaloid_lng$Compound, levels = rev(compound_order))

```

```{r Plot heatmap with alkaloid qualitative data}

# Set output directory
out_dir_heat <- "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script3"

# Define the colours that are going to be used in the heatmap
cols_heatmap <- c("NO" = "#D9D9D9", "TRACES" = "#F0C419", "YES" = "#0072B4")

# Draw the heatmap
heatmap <- ggplot(alkaloid_lng, aes(x = SampleID, y = Compound, fill = Value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols_heatmap, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.50) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 5, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 4),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4),
    plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2)  # less inner margins
  )

# Save the heatmap into a PDF file (A4 landscape -> more width => wider rectangles)
ggsave(filename = file.path(out_dir_heat, "heatmap_alkaloids_qual.pdf"), 
       plot = heatmap, width = 11.69, height = 8.27, units = "in")

```

```{r}
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(dplyr)

# Seleccionar solo variables de compuestos
alkaloid_cat <- alkaloid_data %>%
  select(-all_of(meta_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.factor))

# MCA
mca_res <- MCA(alkaloid_cat, graph = FALSE)

# Asegurar que Hostsp es factor
host_factor <- as.factor(alkaloid_data$Hostsp)

# Plot
fviz_mca_ind(mca_res,
             habillage = host_factor,
             addEllipses = TRUE,
             palette = "jco",
             repel = TRUE)
mca_res$var$contrib

library(dplyr)
library(vegan)

# Load the dataset
alkaloid_data <- read.table(
  "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/ALKALOIDS/alkaloids_qualitative.csv",
  sep = ";",
  header = TRUE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

library(dplyr)
library(vegan)

# Metadata columns
meta_cols <- c("Hostsp", "IndividualID", "SampleID", "E")

# Save original order
sample_order <- alkaloid_data$SampleID
compound_order <- colnames(alkaloid_data)[!(colnames(alkaloid_data) %in% meta_cols)]

# Recode qualitative values to numeric
data_num <- alkaloid_data %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      -any_of(meta_cols),
      ~ case_when(
          trimws(toupper(as.character(.x))) == "NO" ~ 0,
          trimws(toupper(as.character(.x))) %in% c("TRACE", "TRACES") ~ 1,
          trimws(toupper(as.character(.x))) == "YES" ~ 2,
          TRUE ~ NA_real_
        )
    )
  )

# Keep only compound columns
nmds_input <- data_num %>%
  select(-any_of(meta_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

# Check problematic rows
rows_with_na <- rowSums(is.na(nmds_input)) > 0
empty_rows   <- rowSums(nmds_input, na.rm = TRUE) == 0

# Keep only complete and non-empty rows
keep_rows <- !rows_with_na & !empty_rows

nmds_input_clean <- nmds_input[keep_rows, , drop = FALSE]
meta_clean <- alkaloid_data[keep_rows, , drop = FALSE]

# Assign row names after filtering
rownames(nmds_input_clean) <- meta_clean$SampleID

# Run NMDS
set.seed(123)
nmds <- metaMDS(
  nmds_input_clean,
  distance = "gower",
  autotransform = FALSE,
  trymax = 200
)

# Plot
plot(nmds, type = "t")
adonis2(nmds_input ~ Hostsp, data = data_num, method = "gower")


library(vegan)

# Distancia (coherente con lo anterior)
dist_mat <- vegdist(nmds_input_clean, method = "gower")

# Clustering jerárquico
hc <- hclust(dist_mat, method = "average")  # UPGMA

plot(hc, labels = meta_clean$SampleID, main = "Hierarchical clustering")

# Filtrar filas que NO sean Farun
keep <- meta_clean$Hostsp != "Farun"

nmds_noFarun <- nmds_input_clean[keep, , drop = FALSE]
meta_noFarun <- meta_clean[keep, , drop = FALSE]

# Recalcular distancia
dist_mat <- vegdist(nmds_noFarun, method = "gower")

# Clustering
hc <- hclust(dist_mat, method = "average")

# Plot
plot(hc, labels = meta_noFarun$SampleID,
     main = "Hierarchical clustering (sin Farun)")

```

```{r End of script}

# Message announcing the end of the script and where to find the output files
cat("\n✅ Script executed successfully.\n\nAll output files are available in 'FrothEpi_Github/Fungal_endophyte/data/outputs_script#3 \nwithin the GitHub repository downloaded by the user.\n")

CAMBIA ESTOOO!!!!!

```
